title: FPS - Display (Forge)
description: Forge backport of the fabric mod to display your FPS on screen.
body:
### What is this?
This is a simple 1.12.2 mod that displays your current FPS onscreen. Useful if your modpack doesn't support OptiFine.

Original mod is [FPS - Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/fpsdisplay).
### Warning
This mod is still in alpha, bugs are expected!
Report them on Github!
